name: Mexican-Style Creamed Corn
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pkg frozen whole kernel corn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the corn, green pepper, red pepper, and celery.
2. Add 1/2 cup water to the pan.
3. Cook for about 5 minutes or until the corn is tender.
4. Drain any excess liquid from the corn mixture.
5. Stir in the cream cheese, chili peppers, milk, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and a dash of pepper.
6. Heat through the ingredients until evenly warm.
Per serving: 94 calories, 4 g protein, 17 g carbohydrates, 3 g fat, 0 mg cholesterol, 215 mg sodium, 144 mg potassium.
